# o2-scalpel-cpp

Scalpel refactor MCP server for C/C++ via clangd

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-cpp --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `clangd` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .c, .cc, .cpp, .cxx, .c++, .h, .hh, .hpp, .hxx, .h++, .ipp, .inl, .tpp

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_split_file` | Split a C/C++ file along symbol boundaries |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a function |
| `scalpel_inline` | Inline a function at all call sites |
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_organize_includes` | Sort and deduplicate #include directives |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply all auto-fixable diagnostics (source.fixAll.clangd) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
